title: Avocado Mousse
description: A rich and creamy mousse made with ripe avocado, perfect as a dessert or snack.
instructions: 1. Peel and pit the avocados and puree them in a blender until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, melt the chocolate in the microwave in 10-second increments, stirring between each interval.
3. Once the chocolate is melted, let it cool slightly before folding it into the avocado puree.
4. Add the avo-mousse base to the melted chocolate and fold until well combined.
5. Spoon the mousse into individual serving cups or ramekins.
6. Chill the mousse in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
